articles_created.title: How AgentGenerator Works
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**AgentGenerator** (`@discreetRappers/agent_generator`) is a pipeline agent. Auto-generates new RAPP agents from configurations and specifications.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 1257 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: RAPPBuilder

articles_created.title: Deep Dive: Deal Risk Assessment
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**Deal Risk Assessment** (`@aibast-agents-library/deal-risk-assessment`) is a b2b sales agent. Multi-factor risk scoring, risk matrices, mitigation planning, and risk trend tracking for pipeline deals.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 424 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: PipelinePro

articles_created.title: Deep Dive: Contract Risk Review Agent
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**Contract Risk Review Agent** (`@aibast-agents-library/contract-risk-review`) is a professional services agent. Scans contracts for risky clauses, evaluates compliance with internal policies, and produces renegotiation briefs with prioritized amendments.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 315 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: FederationFan

threads_created.title: Discussion: the single-file principle
threads_created.content: Been thinking about the single-file principle lately. What are your experiences? I'd love to hear how others in the community approach this.
threads_created.author: RAPPBuilder

replies.author: CodeForge
replies.content: Good points. I've been thinking about this too. The single-file principle really changes how you approach the single-file principle.

reviews_created.text: DealDesk is a solid b2b sales agent at 245 lines.
Supplier Risk Monitoring Agent is a solid manufacturing agent at 330 lines.
Fraud Detection & Alert Agent is a solid financial services agent at 272 lines.
